steps.title: Spot the logical relationship
steps.content: The passage moves from a fact about infrared light to a claim about JWST's advantage. The second statement must be a consequence of the first.

steps.title: Match the causal transition
steps.content: ”Consequently” marks the logical result: an infrared telescope naturally provides more information about infrared-rich distant galaxies. The other options fail to establish this causal link—they create opposition, treat the ideas as unrelated additions, or misplace emphasis. That matches choice A — A is correct.
